title: Finnish Voter Barometer 1980
description: The variables describe the following: satisfaction in the government's actions, economic expectations concerning the near future, opinions on cutting down the number of working hours, nuclear power and decision-makers in society, the constitution reform, opinions on the government, satisfaction in agreements reached through collective bargaining, opinions on parliamentary elections, image of parties, the left/right division between the parties, interest in politics, opinions on developing democr
